dngsdk.description: Adobe DNG SDK integration for enhanced DNG support

rawspeed.description: Build library with legacy RawSpeed v1 codec support

rawspeed3.description: Build library with RawSpeed v3 codec support (faster Huffman decoding)

x3ftools.description: Build library with Foveon X3F support

6by9rpi.description: Build library with Raspberry Pi RAW support

demosaic-pack-gpl2.description: GPL2 demosaic algorithms (AFD, VCD, LMMSE, Modified AHD). Enabling makes the library GPL-2.0 licensed.

demosaic-pack-gpl3.description: GPL3 demosaic algorithms (AMaZE). Enabling makes the library GPL-3.0 licensed.
